run_query_mcp_clickhouse
tool_call.args:
{"query":"SELECT name, create_table_query
FROM system.tables
WHERE database = 'magento_analytics'
  AND (name LIKE '%order%' OR name LIKE '%item%' OR name LIKE '%product%')
ORDER BY name"}

tool_call.name: run_query_mcp_clickhouse
tool_call.args:
{"query":"WITH yesterday AS (
  SELECT toDate(now()) - 1 AS d
)
SELECT
  toDate(o.created_at) AS order_date,
  sumIf(toFloat64(i.qty_ordered), lowerUTF8(i.name) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(i.sku) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(i.sku) IN (
    SELECT sku FROM magento_analytics.product_catalog WHERE lowerUTF8(subtype) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(department) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(series_text) LIKE '%perfume%'
  )) AS perfumes_sold_qty,
  countDistinctIf(o.entity_id, lowerUTF8(i.name) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(i.sku) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(i.sku) IN (
    SELECT sku FROM magento_analytics.product_catalog WHERE lowerUTF8(subtype) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(department) LIKE '%perfume%' OR lowerUTF8(series_text) LIKE '%perfume%'
  )) AS orders_with_perfume
FROM magento_analytics.magento_orders o
INNER JOIN magento_analytics.magento_order_items i ON o.entity_id = i.order_id
WHERE toDate(o.created_at) = (SELECT d FROM yesterday)
GROUP BY order_date
ORDER BY order_date"}

tool_call.name: run_query_mcp_clickhouse
tool_call.args:
{"query":"SELECT
  count() AS perfume_items_sold_qty
FROM magento_analytics.magento_order_items i
ANY INNER JOIN (
  SELECT entity_id
  FROM magento_analytics.magento_orders
  WHERE toDate(created_at) = toDate(now()) - 1
) o ON i.order_id = o.entity_id
WHERE lowerUTF8(i.name) LIKE '%perfume%'
   OR lowerUTF8(i.sku) LIKE '%perfume%'
   OR i.sku IN (
      SELECT sku
      FROM magento_analytics.product_catalog
      WHERE lowerUTF8(subtype) LIKE '%perfume%'
         OR lowerUTF8(department) LIKE '%perfume%'
         OR lowerUTF8(series_text) LIKE '%perfume%'
   )"}

content.text:
I found **241 perfume items sold yesterday**.

```sql
SELECT
  count() AS perfume_items_sold_qty
FROM magento_analytics.magento_order_items i
ANY INNER JOIN (
  SELECT entity_id
  FROM magento_analytics.magento_orders
  WHERE toDate(created_at) = toDate(now()) - 1
) o ON i.order_id = o.entity_id
WHERE lowerUTF8(i.name) LIKE '%perfume%'
   OR lowerUTF8(i.sku) LIKE '%perfume%'
   OR i.sku IN (
      SELECT sku
      FROM magento_analytics.product_catalog
      WHERE lowerUTF8(subtype) LIKE '%perfume%'
         OR lowerUTF8(department) LIKE '%perfume%'
         OR lowerUTF8(series_text) LIKE '%perfume%'
   )
```

Source: `magento_analytics.magento_order_items` · Freshness: 2026-06-23 · Key filters: orders created on yesterday’s date; perfume matched by item name/SKU or product catalog subtype/department/series · Confidence: medium
